name: ferrovia-workspace
description: Workspace for ferrovia, a SVGO-compatible SVG optimizer written in Rust
author: Sebastian Werner <s.werner@sebastian-software.de>

scripts.build:napi: pnpm exec napi build --manifest-path crates/ferrovia-napi/Cargo.toml --package-json-path packages/node/package.json --output-dir packages/node --platform --release --no-js
